excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Nutrition and Healthy Ageing (Nutrition in Practice) lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/15058-npf Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: One-off entry scholarship will be granted to students with excellent academic achievements.
